phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to another terminal
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ah-LAY oh tehr-mee-NAL duh UH
phrases.cultural_note: The free CDGVAL shuttle train connects all terminals. It runs every 4 minutes. Terminal 2 has sub-terminals (2A-2G) connected by walkways and buses.

responses.english: Take the CDGVAL shuttle, it is free between terminals.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY lah nah-VET see-day-zhay-VAL, seh grah-TWEET ahn-truh lay tehr-mee-NOH
responses.french: Prenez la navette CDGVAL, c'est gratuit entre les terminaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the RER B to Paris
phrases.text_local: Où est la gare RER B pour aller à Paris ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah GAHR air-uh-AIR BEH poor ah-LAY ah pah-REE
phrases.cultural_note: The RER B station is at Terminal 2 (between 2C/D and 2E/F) and Terminal 3. The train to central Paris takes about 35 minutes and costs around 11 euros.

responses.english: The RER B is downstairs, follow the signs for 'Paris by train'.
responses.phonetic: luh ehr-uh-EHR bay eh tahn bah, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH pah-REE par luh trahn
responses.french: Le RER B est en bas, suivez les panneaux 'Paris par le train'.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a taxi
phrases.text_local: Où est la station de taxis ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah stah-SYOHN duh tahk-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Official taxis are at marked stands outside arrivals. Fixed fare to Paris: 55 euros (Right Bank) or 62 euros (Left Bank). Never accept rides from people soliciting inside the terminal.

responses.english: Taxis are at the exit, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lay tahk-SEE sohn tah lah sor-TEE, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Les taxis sont à la sortie, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.text_local: Où est le contrôle des passeports ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh kohn-TROHL day pahs-POR
phrases.cultural_note: EU passport holders can use the automated gates. Non-EU travelers use the staffed lanes. If you have a connecting flight, check if you need to go through passport control.

responses.english: Passport control is after disembarkation, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: luh kohn-TROHL day pahs-POR eh tah-PREH luh day-bark-MAHN, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Le contrôle des passeports est après le débarquement, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a SIM card or WiFi
phrases.text_local: Où acheter une carte SIM prépayée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ahsh-TAY oon KART seem pray-pay-YAY
phrases.cultural_note: SIM card shops are in the arrivals area. Free WiFi is available throughout CDG (network: WIFI-AIRPORT). Consider buying a SIM for data during your Paris stay.

responses.english: There are SIM card shops in the terminal, after customs.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day boo-TEEK duh kart seem dahn luh tehr-mee-NAL, ah-PREH lah dwahn
responses.french: Il y a des boutiques de cartes SIM dans le terminal, après la douane.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Roissybus to Opéra
phrases.text_local: Où prendre le Roissybus pour Opéra ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PRAHNDR luh rwah-see-BOOS poor oh-pay-RAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Roissybus runs directly to Opéra Garnier in central Paris. It costs about 16 euros and takes 60-75 minutes depending on traffic. Stops at all terminals.

responses.english: The Roissybus leaves from the terminal exit, every fifteen minutes.
responses.phonetic: luh rwah-SEE-boos par duh lah sor-TEE doo tehr-mee-NAL, toot lay kanz mee-NOOT
responses.french: Le Roissybus part de la sortie du terminal, toutes les quinze minutes.
